reviews.review_description: The idea of parkour games makes me excited I love parkour vr games like this one

Keep falling is a great game with a bunch of different level levels where the goal is to keep falling. But there are obstacles and you need to use your skills to avoid them and keep falling. When you play you get gold to buy really cool cosmetics and there is good music in the game with a great staff team. Everything in the game looks great and I 100% recommend it. It’s very close to keep climbing, but it isn’t a keep climbing copy because the owner of the game has permission to make this
